evals.prompt: Check my Windows security posture and see if I need any updates
evals.expected_output: A security report showing Windows version, last update date, support status, and any necessary updates

evals.prompt: Detect if my OpenClaw version is outdated and check for any security risks
evals.expected_output: A report showing OpenClaw version status and any security risks detected

evals.prompt: Scan my local network for exposed OpenClaw ports and weak credentials
evals.expected_output: A security report showing any exposed ports and weak credentials found
